notes: Strongest moment: turn 2 cleanly recognizes the stop signal on already-signed-off, precisely-specified work and offers two non-manufactured paths (record as-is / probe one named aspect) rather than forcing an elenchus over settled ground — exactly the 'Not for: ideas already specified precisely' handling the scenario tests. Weakest moment: labeling the verdict 'sharpened' when the brief itself concedes nothing changed under questioning is a slight stretch, though the examiner is fully transparent about it and no better enum value exists; the brief invents no content and its next_step is a permitted process action, not idea-level advice.
